info.name: HyperCache - Distributed Cache Testing
info.description:
Complete test suite for HyperCache 3-node cluster.

Ports:
- Node 1: HTTP 9080, RESP 8080, Gossip 7946
- Node 2: HTTP 9081, RESP 8081, Gossip 7947
- Node 3: HTTP 9082, RESP 8082, Gossip 7948

Run requests in order for a full scenario walkthrough.

item.name: 1. Health & Cluster Status
item.description: Verify all nodes are up and the cluster has formed correctly.

item.name: 2. Prometheus Metrics
item.description: Verify the /metrics endpoint returns valid Prometheus exposition format.

item.name: 3. Cache CRUD - Single Node
item.description: Basic SET / GET / DELETE on a single node to confirm core cache operations.

exec: pm.test('Error says not found', () => pm.expect(body.error).to.include('not found'));

item.name: 4. Cross-Node Replication
item.description: Write to one node, read from others to verify gossip-based replication.

item.name: 5. Delete Replication
item.description: Delete a key on one node and verify it is removed across the cluster.

item.name: 6. Value Types & Edge Cases
item.description: Test storing different value types and edge-case keys.

item.name: 7. Bulk Load & Metrics Validation
item.description: Insert several keys then verify metrics reflect the operations.

item.name: 8. Correlation ID Propagation
item.description: Verify that correlation IDs are returned in responses and response headers.

item.name: 9. Cuckoo Filter
item.description: Test the probabilistic Cuckoo filter — verifies negative lookups, stats, and false positive detection.

item.name: 9.2 Filter Check — key that does NOT exist

exec: pm.test('filter_says is false (guaranteed no false negatives)', () => pm.expect(body.filter_says).to.be.false);

item.name: 9.5 Filter Stats (after SET — verify add counted)
10.6 DELETE key, then check filter (filter retains fingerprint)
9.7 Filter Check after DELETE (may show false positive)

exec: // filter_says may be true (false positive) or false (filter deleted it)
// Either outcome is valid — log it for observability
console.log('Detected expected false positive after deletion');

item.name: 9.8 Bulk SET — load filter with keys
10. Cleanup
item.description: Delete all test keys to leave the cluster clean.
